span.p: Section 304: Culpable Homicide not amounting to Murder (eff: 1872-01-01)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Intention to cause death or bodily injury likely to cause death

span.p: Causing death of a human being

span.p: Act does not amount to murder under section 300
